positive: A stylized, symmetrical graphic of a majestic forest wolf howling at a full moon. The wolf is rendered in a clean, black silhouette style, creating a strong, dramatic focal point against a gradient background of deep sapphire blue and cosmic violet. Incorporate minimalist, abstract geometric patterns of stars, constellations, and subtle swirling mist around the wolf and moon to enhance the mystic atmosphere. The composition must be centrally balanced and highly scalable for apparel printing. Use dramatic, high-contrast lighting effects that emphasize the clean edges and strong outlines of the wolf's silhouette. Studio shot, vector art quality, perfect symmetry, centered composition.
